items.title: San Antonio Spurs after signing Tobias Harris, Harrison Barnes, and Julian Champagnie.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
San Antonio Spurs after signing Tobias Harris, Harrison Barnes, and Julian Champagnie.

They still have the bi-annual but may use last roster spots on minimums instead to avoid the luxury tax.

All that's left to do this offseason: Sign Victor Wembanyama to a maximum extension.

items.title: The San Antonio Spurs will add Tobias Harris via the Non-Taxpayer MLE.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The San Antonio Spurs will add Tobias Harris via the Non-Taxpayer MLE.

Spurs will be hard-capped at the first apron and are about $14.6M under that mark with two open roster spots.

items.title: [Charania] Just in: Free agent forward Tobias Harris has agreed to a two-year, $31 million deal with the San Antonio Spurs, sources tell ESPN. Harris exits the Pistons after helping lead a franchise turnaround and now joins a young contending team in the Western Conference.
items.author: curryybacon
items.body_excerpt: Shams Charania: Just in: Free agent forward Tobias Harris has agreed to a two-year, $31 million deal with the San Antonio Spurs, sources tell ESPN. Harris exits the Pistons after helping lead a franchise turnaround and now joins a young contending team in the Western Conference.…
